questions.question: Which animal says “meow”?
questions.wrongHint: Think of a soft pet that loves to nap in sunny spots.

questions.question: Fish live in water.
questions.wrongHint: Fish use gills and love to swim!

questions.question: Which bird is known for mimicking sounds?
questions.wrongHint: This colorful friend can repeat words in a playful way.

questions.question: What do we see in the sky at night that twinkles?
questions.wrongHint: Look up on a clear night — tiny lights far away.

questions.question: Which planet do we live on?
questions.wrongHint: It’s the blue and green planet with oceans and trees.

questions.question: What is this?
questions.wrongHint: It shines at night and can look like a banana shape.

questions.question: Ice is frozen water.
questions.wrongHint: When water gets very cold, it becomes solid ice.

questions.question: Plants need sunlight to make food. This process is called…
questions.wrongHint: Leaves use sunshine to help the plant grow strong.

questions.question: Which is the biggest ocean on Earth?
questions.wrongHint: It’s very wide and touches many countries.

questions.question: Mountains are always flat.
questions.wrongHint: Mountains rise high with peaks and slopes.

questions.question: What do we use to brush our teeth?
questions.wrongHint: It has soft bristles and keeps smiles shiny.

questions.question: Why do we wash hands before eating?
questions.wrongHint: Clean hands help keep our tummy happy.
